zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Brugge於1426年7月出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利時，他的父親Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos29歲，母親Catherine Clifford25歲。他於大約1450年與Florence Darell在英國維爾爾拉姆斯波利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在英國被列為member of parliament。他去世於1493年1月30日在英國格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆享年66歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Brugge于1426年7月出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利时，他的父亲Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos29岁，母亲Catherine Clifford25岁。他于大约1450年与Florence Darell在英国維爾爾拉姆斯波利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在英国被列为member of parliament。他去世于1493年1月30日在英国格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆享年66岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利。

nameMeanings.name: Brugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van der Brugge): topographic name for someone living near a brug ‘bridge’.
Flemish and Dutch: habitational name from Bruges.
North German (Brügge): variant of Bruck or a habitational name from any of several places called Brügge.

variants.name: Bruck
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Naftali, Eliahu, Hershel, Meyer, Ruvim, Shloime, Yoav.

German (also Brück): topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge, or an occupational name for a bridge keeper or toll collector on a bridge, from Middle High German bruck(e) ‘bridge’. Bruck remained the Bavarian and Austrian form, reflected in placenames such as Innsbruck, whereas in central and northern Germany Brück(e) was the regular and ultimately standard form, as for example in the placename Osnabrück. Switzerland has both forms. See also Brueck .
Jewish (from Poland and Belarus): from Polish, Belorussian, or Yiddish bruk ‘pavement’, possibly a metonymic occupational name for a paver.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Brugge was born in July 1426, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos, was 29 and his mother, Catherine Clifford, was 25. He married Florence Darell about 1450, in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. His occupation is listed as member of parliament in England. He died on 30 January 1493, in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Brugge est né en juillet 1426, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Catherine Clifford, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Florence Darell environ 1450, à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1493, à Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.Frampton, Gloucester, England: Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Brugge im Juli 1426 in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos 29 und seine Mutter Catherine Clifford 25. Er hat um 1450 in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England Florence Darell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als member of parliament in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. Januar 1493 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Brugge è nato il nel luglio 1426 nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Clifford, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Florence Darell circa 1450, nel Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel England. Morì il 30 gennaio 1493, nel Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Coberley, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bruggeが1426年7月にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandosは29歳，母Catherine Cliffordは25歳であった。約1450年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアラムスブリーでFlorence Darellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。イギリスでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1493年1月30日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチェルテンハムで66歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Frampton, Gloucester, England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Brugge(이)가 1426년 7월 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Clifford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 영국 윌츠히르 램스버이에서 Florence Darell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1493년 1월 30일 영국 그루스스터실르 헬텐함에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에 묻혔다.

pt.Frampton, Gloucester, England: Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Brugge nasceu em julho de 1426, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Clifford, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Florence Darell aproximadamente 1450, em Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1493, em Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Frampton, Gloucester, England: фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Brugge родился июль 1426 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Clifford, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Florence Darell около 1450 г. в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности Англия. Он умер 30 января 1493 г. в местности челтенам, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Brugge nació en julio de 1426, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Catherine Clifford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Florence Darell aproximadamente 1450, en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Inglaterra. Murió el 30 de enero de 1493, en Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
